title: Impact of postoperative chemotherapy in patients resected for esophagogastric adenocarcinoma with major pathological response after preoperative chemotherapy: a study from the FREGAT database.
abstract: In locally advanced esophagogastric adenocarcinoma (EGA), perioperative chemotherapy is the standard of care and can result in complete/major pathological response. In this setting, real-world data on the impact of postoperative chemotherapy are scarce.
trial_name: Pembrolizumab plus trastuzumab and chemotherapy for HER2-positive gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma
